2603.25385.title: GlowQ: Group-Shared LOw-Rank Approximation for Quantized LLMs
2603.25385.paper_summary: Quantization techniques such as BitsAndBytes, AWQ, and GPTQ are widely used as a standard method in deploying large language models but often degrades accuracy when using low-bit representations, e.g., 4 bits. Low-rank correction methods (e.g., LQER, QERA, ASER) has been proposed to mitigate this issue, however, they restore all layers and insert error-correction modules into every decoder block, which increases latency and memory overhead. To address this limitation, we propose GlowQ, a group-shared low-rank approximation for quantized LLMs that caches a single shared right factor per input-sharing group and restores only the groups or layers that yield the highest accuracy benefit. GlowQ computes the high-precision projection once per input-sharing group and reuses it across its modules, reducing parameter and memory overhead, and retaining the expressivity of layer-specific corrections. We also propose a selective variant, GlowQ-S, that applies the cached shared module only where it provides the largest benefit. Compared with strong baselines, our approach reduces TTFB by (5.6%) and increases throughput by (9.6%) on average, while reducing perplexity on WikiText-2 by (0.17%) and increasing downstream accuracy by 0.42 percentage points. The selective model GlowQ-S further reduces latency, cutting TTFB by (23.4%) and increasing throughput by (37.4%), while maintaining accuracy within 0.2 percentage points on average.
2603.25385.paper_summary_zh: 量化技術如 BitsAndBytes、AWQ 和 GPTQ 被廣泛用作部署大型語言模型的標準方法，但在使用低位表示時（例如 4 位）往往會降低準確性。已提出低秩修正方法（例如 LQER、QERA、ASER）來緩解這一問題，然而，它們恢復所有層並在每個解碼器區塊中插入錯誤修正模塊，這增加了延遲和內存開銷。為了解決這一限制，我們提出了 GlowQ，一種針對量化 LLM 的群組共享低秩近似，該方法為每個輸入共享組緩存一個共享的右因子，並僅恢復產生最高準確性收益的組或層。GlowQ 每個輸入共享組計算一次高精度投影，並在其模塊之間重用，從而減少參數和內存開銷，同時保留層特定修正的表達能力。我們還提出了一個選擇性變體 GlowQ-S，僅在提供最大收益的地方應用緩存的共享模塊。與強基準相比，我們的方法將 TTFB 減少了 (5.6%)，並將吞吐量平均提高了 (9.6%)，同時在 WikiText-2 上將困惑度降低了 (0.17%)，並將下游準確性提高了 0.42 個百分點。選擇性模型 GlowQ-S 進一步減少了延遲，將 TTFB 削減了 (23.4%)，並將吞吐量提高了 (37.4%)，同時在平均上保持準確性在 0.2 個百分點以內。
2603.25385.author: Selim An et.al.
2603.25385.authors: Selim An, Il hong Suh, Yeseong Kim
